topics.notes: first quiz: nailed closed-loop, used-not-stored, adaptive glossing

Q1 (root cause of footer drift = agent hand-estimated low) nailed it. Q2 (single source: header/footer both pull from session_tokens.md) missed — confused 'shown numbers differ' with 'different source'; the gap is timing (snapshot vs live), not source. Reinforced with the airport-clock analogy. Strong on spotting the mistake, needs the snapshot-vs-live nuance.

Q1: grasped clarify-first spirit, missed the 'G0 is skippable so trigger would be lost' mechanism. Q2: knew out_of_scope prompts clarification but missed that it is a PERSISTED list-of-non-goals compared at close. Re-teach: detect-before-skip + record-vs-just-ask.
not-sure x2; re-taught: timing (scrutinize=post-build too late vs skeptical_reviewer=pre-execution gate) + never-always-load (token weight; ironically rejected-idea e). keep glossing high
